hero.tagline: Born in India. Built for every road.

overview.minides: Commanding, spacious, and feature-packed — the Safari delivers premium SUV comfort with unmistakable presence.
overview.description: The Tata Safari facelift is a 6/7-seat mid-size SUV built on the D8 platform (Land Rover derived). Available in 6 trims across 50 variants including Diesel and Petrol engines, Manual and Automatic gearboxes, and exclusive Dark, Stealth, and Red Dark editions. Top-spec gets 7 airbags, Level-2 ADAS, 12.3-inch touchscreen, 10-speaker JBL, gesture tailgate, 19-inch alloys, Alexa, eCall/bCall, and ventilated front/captain seats.

suspension.front: Independent – MacPherson Strut with Anti-Roll Bar
suspension.rear: Semi-Independent – Twist Blade with Anti-Roll Bar
